meaning: n.北美土人所用之一种烟斗,和平的象征
examples: A city of northwest Indiana on Lake Michigan in the Calumet region south-southeast of Chicago, Illinois. It is an industrial center. Population, 33,892.
Calumet Specialty Product Partners LP shares are currently trading up about 3.3% on the day.
Seven of its horses have won the race, making Calumet the owner with the most victories.
The same happened to a professor at Purdue University at Calumet in 2012, who faced a four-month investigation.
